repositories.title: google-labs-code / design.md
repositories.description: A format specification for describing a visual identity to coding agents. DESIGN.md gives agents a persistent, structured understanding of a design system.
repositories.summary: Defines a `DESIGN.md` format for describing visual identity to coding agents. Combines YAML design tokens with Markdown rationale so agents get exact values and usage guidance. Includes a CLI for linting, diffing, and exporting design tokens to other formats. Aims to help agents produce consistent UI output from a persistent design system spec.
summary_bullets: Defines a `DESIGN.md` format for describing visual identity to coding agents.
Combines YAML design tokens with Markdown rationale so agents get exact values and usage guidance.
Includes a CLI for linting, diffing, and exporting design tokens to other formats.
Aims to help agents produce consistent UI output from a persistent design system spec.

repositories.title: calesthio / OpenMontage
repositories.description: World's first open-source, agentic video production system. 12 pipelines, 52 tools, 500+ agent skills. Turn your AI coding assistant into a full video production studio.
repositories.summary: Provides an open-source, agentic video production workflow from idea to finished video. Uses AI to research topics, write scripts, generate assets, edit scenes, and render final compositions. Supports both image-based videos and real-footage documentary-style videos built from open sources. Targets users working with AI coding assistants who want automated video creation pipelines.
summary_bullets: Provides an open-source, agentic video production workflow from idea to finished video.
Uses AI to research topics, write scripts, generate assets, edit scenes, and render final compositions.
Supports both image-based videos and real-footage documentary-style videos built from open sources.
Targets users working with AI coding assistants who want automated video creation pipelines.

repositories.title: xbtlin / ai-berkshire
repositories.description: AI 时代的伯克希尔：基于 Claude Code 的价值投资研究框架。巴菲特·芒格·段永平·李录四大师方法论 + 多Agent并行研究。| AI-era Berkshire: a value investing research framework built on Claude Code. 4 masters' methodologies + multi-agent adversarial analysis.
repositories.summary: Offers a structured AI-assisted investment research framework based on value investing methods. Encodes workflows from multiple investing perspectives to force a clear buy, pass, or gray-zone conclusion. Adds checks for financial rigor, cross-validation, and reproducible report structure. Includes a set of research and portfolio management skills for equity analysis and decision discipline.
summary_bullets: Offers a structured AI-assisted investment research framework based on value investing methods.
Encodes workflows from multiple investing perspectives to force a clear buy, pass, or gray-zone conclusion.
Adds checks for financial rigor, cross-validation, and reproducible report structure.
Includes a set of research and portfolio management skills for equity analysis and decision discipline.

repositories.title: mauriceboe / TREK
repositories.description: A self-hosted travel/trip planner with real-time collaboration, interactive maps, PWA support, SSO, budgets, packing lists, and more.
repositories.summary: A self-hosted collaborative travel planner for trips, budgets, packing lists, notes, and reservations. Includes maps, route planning, weather forecasts, document storage, and expense tracking. Supports real-time multi-user collaboration with invites, roles, chat, polls, and sync. Also ships mobile/PWA support and an MCP server so AI assistants can manage trips.
summary_bullets: A self-hosted collaborative travel planner for trips, budgets, packing lists, notes, and reservations.
Includes maps, route planning, weather forecasts, document storage, and expense tracking.
Supports real-time multi-user collaboration with invites, roles, chat, polls, and sync.
Also ships mobile/PWA support and an MCP server so AI assistants can manage trips.

repositories.title: apple / container
repositories.description: A tool for creating and running Linux containers using lightweight virtual machines on a Mac. It is written in Swift, and optimized for Apple silicon.
repositories.summary: A macOS tool for running Linux containers as lightweight virtual machines on Apple silicon. Works with OCI images so users can pull, run, build, and push standard container images. Provides install, update, and uninstall flows through signed packages and system services. Targets developers who want container workflows on modern Macs.
summary_bullets: A macOS tool for running Linux containers as lightweight virtual machines on Apple silicon.
Works with OCI images so users can pull, run, build, and push standard container images.
Provides install, update, and uninstall flows through signed packages and system services.
Targets developers who want container workflows on modern Macs.

repositories.title: JCodesMore / ai-website-cloner-template
repositories.description: Clone any website with one command using AI coding agents
repositories.summary: A template for reverse-engineering websites into a modern Next.js codebase with AI agents. Guides agents through site reconnaissance, token extraction, component specs, and parallel rebuilds. Designed for rebuilding sites you own into maintainable code, not for impersonation or deceptive copying. Includes project structure, scripts, and agent instructions to support the cloning workflow.
summary_bullets: A template for reverse-engineering websites into a modern Next.js codebase with AI agents.
Guides agents through site reconnaissance, token extraction, component specs, and parallel rebuilds.
Designed for rebuilding sites you own into maintainable code, not for impersonation or deceptive copying.
Includes project structure, scripts, and agent instructions to support the cloning workflow.

repositories.title: garrytan / gstack
repositories.description: Use Garry Tan's exact Claude Code setup: 23 opinionated tools that serve as CEO, Designer, Eng Manager, Release Manager, Doc Engineer, and QA
repositories.summary: A collection of Claude Code workflows, commands, and skills for running software projects with AI. Organizes the work into planning, design review, implementation, QA, shipping, and retrospectives. Includes role-based commands for review, debugging, deployment, and cross-model workflows. Aims to turn a coding agent into a structured engineering team with repeatable processes.
summary_bullets: A collection of Claude Code workflows, commands, and skills for running software projects with AI.
Organizes the work into planning, design review, implementation, QA, shipping, and retrospectives.
Includes role-based commands for review, debugging, deployment, and cross-model workflows.
Aims to turn a coding agent into a structured engineering team with repeatable processes.

repositories.title: aws / agent-toolkit-for-aws
repositories.description: Official, AWS-supported MCP servers, skills, and plugins to help AI agents build on AWS
repositories.summary: Provides tools and skills to help AI coding agents build and manage applications on AWS. Bundles plugins for service selection, containers, serverless, storage, observability, and agents. Also includes workflows for data analytics and DevSecOps tasks such as incidents and security reviews. Targets agents used in Claude Code, Codex, Cursor, Kiro, and similar environments.
summary_bullets: Provides tools and skills to help AI coding agents build and manage applications on AWS.
Bundles plugins for service selection, containers, serverless, storage, observability, and agents.
Also includes workflows for data analytics and DevSecOps tasks such as incidents and security reviews.
Targets agents used in Claude Code, Codex, Cursor, Kiro, and similar environments.

repositories.title: mukul975 / Anthropic-Cybersecurity-Skills
repositories.description: 817 structured cybersecurity skills for AI agents · Mapped to 6 frameworks: MITRE ATT&CK, NIST CSF 2.0, MITRE ATLAS, D3FEND, NIST AI RMF & MITRE F3 (Fight Fraud) · agentskills.io standard · Works with Claude Code, GitHub Copilot, Codex CLI, Cursor, Gemini CLI & 20+ platforms · 29 security domains · Apache 2.0
repositories.summary: A large open-source library of cybersecurity skills for AI agents. Covers many security domains such as cloud security, threat hunting, forensics, malware analysis, and red teaming. Maps skills to major frameworks including MITRE ATT&CK, NIST CSF, ATLAS, D3FEND, AI RMF, and F3. Designed to give agents structured analyst playbooks instead of generic security advice.
summary_bullets: A large open-source library of cybersecurity skills for AI agents.
Covers many security domains such as cloud security, threat hunting, forensics, malware analysis, and red teaming.
Maps skills to major frameworks including MITRE ATT&CK, NIST CSF, ATLAS, D3FEND, AI RMF, and F3.
Designed to give agents structured analyst playbooks instead of generic security advice.

repositories.title: alibaba / page-agent
repositories.description: JavaScript in-page GUI agent. Control web interfaces with natural language.
repositories.summary: A client-side GUI agent that controls web interfaces using natural language. Runs inside the webpage, avoiding browser extensions or headless browser setup for the main path. Supports DOM-based interaction, optional multi-page control, and an MCP server for external control. Aims to help with in-app copilot experiences, form filling, accessibility, and browser task automation.
summary_bullets: A client-side GUI agent that controls web interfaces using natural language.
Runs inside the webpage, avoiding browser extensions or headless browser setup for the main path.
Supports DOM-based interaction, optional multi-page control, and an MCP server for external control.
Aims to help with in-app copilot experiences, form filling, accessibility, and browser task automation.

repositories.title: IceWhaleTech / CasaOS
repositories.description: CasaOS - A simple, easy-to-use, elegant open-source Personal Cloud system.
repositories.summary: A personal cloud platform for managing apps, files, storage, and home-server services. Focuses on a friendly UI for non-technical home and small-organization use. Supports one-click installation of popular self-hosted apps and many Docker applications. Includes widgets, device support, and system management features for a local cloud setup.
summary_bullets: A personal cloud platform for managing apps, files, storage, and home-server services.
Focuses on a friendly UI for non-technical home and small-organization use.
Supports one-click installation of popular self-hosted apps and many Docker applications.
Includes widgets, device support, and system management features for a local cloud setup.

repositories.title: opendatalab / MinerU
repositories.description: Transforms complex documents like PDFs and Office docs into LLM-ready markdown/JSON for your Agentic workflows.
repositories.summary: A document parsing engine that converts PDFs, office files, images, and web pages into structured output. Designed for LLM, RAG, and agent workflows that need reliable text, tables, and layout extraction. Supports OCR, multilingual documents, formulas, tables, and multiple deployment modes. Provides APIs, CLI tools, SDKs, MCP integration, and desktop/web access for different users.
summary_bullets: A document parsing engine that converts PDFs, office files, images, and web pages into structured output.
Designed for LLM, RAG, and agent workflows that need reliable text, tables, and layout extraction.
Supports OCR, multilingual documents, formulas, tables, and multiple deployment modes.
Provides APIs, CLI tools, SDKs, MCP integration, and desktop/web access for different users.

repositories.title: Free-TV / IPTV
repositories.description: M3U Playlist for free TV channels
repositories.summary: Maintains a free IPTV playlist of TV channels from around the world. Focuses on only free, mainstream, and generally reliable channels. Provides an M3U8 source that IPTV players can load directly. Uses curated list files and generation scripts to build the playlist.
summary_bullets: Maintains a free IPTV playlist of TV channels from around the world.
Focuses on only free, mainstream, and generally reliable channels.
Provides an M3U8 source that IPTV players can load directly.
Uses curated list files and generation scripts to build the playlist.

repositories.title: shanraisshan / claude-code-best-practice
repositories.description: from vibe coding to agentic engineering - practice makes claude perfect
repositories.summary: A curated repository of Claude Code best practices, workflows, commands, and skills. Collects advice on planning, session management, memory, agents, hooks, and review workflows. Highlights patterns for team use, cross-model workflows, and structured development processes. Serves as a reference for people building more disciplined AI-assisted software workflows.
summary_bullets: A curated repository of Claude Code best practices, workflows, commands, and skills.
Collects advice on planning, session management, memory, agents, hooks, and review workflows.
Highlights patterns for team use, cross-model workflows, and structured development processes.
Serves as a reference for people building more disciplined AI-assisted software workflows.

repositories.title: NanmiCoder / MediaCrawler
repositories.description: 小红书笔记 | 评论爬虫、抖音视频 | 评论爬虫、快手视频 | 评论爬虫、B 站视频 ｜ 评论爬虫、微博帖子 ｜ 评论爬虫、百度贴吧帖子 ｜ 百度贴吧评论回复爬虫 | 知乎问答文章｜评论爬虫
repositories.summary: A multi-platform social media crawler for collecting public content from Chinese social platforms. Supports keyword search, post detail capture, comments, creator pages, and login-state reuse. Uses browser automation to avoid complex reverse engineering of signing logic. Stores data in formats like CSV, JSON, Excel, SQLite, and MySQL for later analysis.
summary_bullets: A multi-platform social media crawler for collecting public content from Chinese social platforms.
Supports keyword search, post detail capture, comments, creator pages, and login-state reuse.
Uses browser automation to avoid complex reverse engineering of signing logic.
Stores data in formats like CSV, JSON, Excel, SQLite, and MySQL for later analysis.
